title: Errol Mclaughlin
compiled_truth: Errol Mclaughlin is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-05-13), Errol Mclaughlin sent 790 and received 1183 emails, totalling 1973 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dutch Quigley](people/dutch-quigley) (111), [Joey Taylor](people/joey-taylor) (97), [John Griffith](people/john-griffith) (96), [John Arnold](people/john-arnold) (90), [Bilal Bajwa](people/bilal-bajwa) (77). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, deleted_items, inbox, sent, sent_items, to_do.
timeline:
